title: POST /api/sessions/start body
description: Runtime launch of a session. Handler: app.start_session. If `cast` is empty object or omitted, server fills via registry.get_active_names() and _auto_cast (requires at least one online agent, may assign one agent to multiple roles). If `draft_message_id` is set, `template_id` is derived from message metadata and template is registered temporarily in SessionStore. Goal is stored truncated to 500 chars. cast keys MUST be template role strings; each value MUST be the canonical chat `sender` string for that participant (exact string equality when SessionEngine matches the next message’s sender to the cast entry).

template_id.description: Id of a loaded template (library or custom). Ignored as primary source when `draft_message_id` is present (draft supplies inline template).

draft_message_id.description: Chat message id whose metadata contains validated `template` draft. Coerces via int() on server from JSON number.

channel.description: Channel id. Default on server if missing: "general". Only one active session per channel (active|waiting|paused).

cast.description: Map role id (from template.roles) → canonical chat sender / participant id (exact string used as message `sender` when it is that role’s turn). Empty object triggers server auto-cast from get_active_names(). JSON Schema cannot verify keys against a template without coupling to a specific template instance.

goal.description: Optional session goal; stripped and truncated to 500 characters in SessionStore.create.

started_by.description: Recorded on session as started_by. Passed to _auto_cast but that helper does not use it today.
